title: gymnadenia borealis
intro: Gymnadenia borealis, also known as the Northern Summer Green Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family, known for its delicate white flowers. Traditionally, the Gymnadenia borealis plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion. In herbal preparations, Gymnadenia borealis is often used in infusions, teas, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions and side effects.
